heading: Cross reference
label: 5663 Cross reference
text: For penalties of common application pertaining to liquors, including wines, see part IV.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 5663, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section, prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 695Pub. L. 85–859
Amendments1979— struck out reference to penalties for rectified products under part I of this subchapter.Pub. L. 96–39
Effective Date of 1979 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–39section 810 of Pub. L. 96–39section 5001 of this titleJan. 1, 1980
